title: MoreMobility
description: Brings new faster engines, cool frames, a useful attachment, and a road mechanism to Automobility Mod.
body:
# MoreMobility

An addon for AutoMobility. Add new engine, attachment, and frames, which we always wanted. AutoMobility required.

## Features
- **New engines**
  - Netherite Engine...10% faster than the creative engine. Unlock the fastest driving experience with the hardened mysterious ingot.
- **New frames**
  - Silver
  - Racing Shopping Cart (Significantly lightweight) 
- **New Attachment**
  - Advanced Crop Harvester (Rear)...Very useful especially you have vast farmlands.
- **Offroad mechanism**
  - When driving on offroad, you'll get 50% slower speed.
  - With an Offroad wheel, you'll get 20% instead. Concrete blocks are considered non-offroad blocks.
  - You can turn off this feature from config file.

## Integrations
- EMI
  - Support Auto Mechanic Table recipe

## Credits
- Inspired from [AutoMobility](https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility)
